brief: 美甲肤色对比图，黄皮手部试色对比效果。 手型：自然亚洲女性手型。 肤色：黄皮。 甲型：短方圆。 甲长：短甲。 主色调：夏日蓝色 猫眼。 质感：猫眼磁粉，玻璃感，高光泽。 光线：自然光，柔和明亮。 背景：干净浅色背景，小红书风格。 风格：清透 显白。 小红书图文风格，画面精美，高质感，无水印。
prompt: Create a poster image for poster aimed at broad professional audience. Treat this as a design-led visual solving this brief: 美甲肤色对比图，黄皮手部试色对比效果。 手型：自然亚洲女性手型。 肤色：黄皮。 甲型：短方圆。 甲长：短甲。 主色调：夏日蓝色 猫眼。 质感：猫眼磁粉，玻璃感，高光泽。 光线：自然光，柔和明亮。 背景：干净浅色背景，小红书风格。 风格：清透 显白。 小红书图文风格，画面精美，高质感，无水印。. Communication goal: attract and persuade quickly in a campaign or recruitment context. Translate the brief into one strong hero concept rather than many equal-weight elements. Brand and context strategy: no explicit brand provided; commit to one coherent visual system instead of averaging styles. Visual system: base mode: editorial campaign key visual; direction bias: premium editorial, contemporary, polished, commercially strong; energy bias: energetic but disciplined, confident, professional; composition bias: clear hierarchy, dynamic but stable layout, deliberate focal contrast; palette bias: premium neutrals with one strong accent family. Hierarchy: one clear hero idea; one dominant hero visual or symbolic concept, never a collage of equal-weight objects; secondary elements must support the hero rather than compete with it; background should create rhythm, not narrative confusion. Composition: clear hierarchy, dynamic but stable layout, deliberate focal contrast. Safe zone: reserve a clean, obvious text-safe zone in the upper third or one side for headline and CTA copy. Lighting: crisp premium lighting with controlled contrast and energetic highlights. Color strategy: restricted premium palette with disciplined neutrals and one energetic accent family. Detail density: hero-detail emphasis with a restrained background; hero-rich detail with restrained background complexity. Style direction: base mode: editorial campaign key visual; direction bias: premium editorial, contemporary, polished, commercially strong; energy bias: energetic but disciplined, confident, professional; composition bias: clear hierarchy, dynamic but stable layout, deliberate focal contrast; palette bias: premium neutrals with one strong accent family. Mood: energetic but disciplined, confident, professional. Aspect ratio: 3:4. Important constraints: make the result feel campaign-ready rather than generic AI art; prioritize focal hierarchy and typography-safe composition. Avoid: avoid generic AI clutter; avoid random floating UI fragments or HUD overlays; avoid generic gradient fog with no composition logic; avoid cheap neon cyberpunk treatment unless explicitly requested; avoid noisy micro-detail that weakens the hierarchy; poster text rendered directly into the image unless explicitly requested; random marketing icons and decorative interface fragments. Emphasize strong hierarchy, intentional whitespace, disciplined background complexity, and polished professional finish.
